ValidationRule.description: Product and quantity should be mandatory if the sub type is service complaints
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF( (ISPICKVAL(Case_Sub_Type__c, 'Product Issue') || ISPICKVAL(Case_Sub_Type__c, 'Health Issue')) && ISBLANK(ProductId), TRUE, FALSE )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Product and Quantity are mandatory if the case sub type is Health Issue or Product Issue.
